description: Sources that `prm init --demo` ingests to seed a demo PRM home. All synthetic (see tests/fixtures/); paths are relative to the repo root. JSON, not TOML, for Python 3.10 (no stdlib tomllib).

sources.note: ~1000-contact bulk corpus — the bulk of the demo
vendor CSV — ingested once the CSV parser lands (plan §11 M1)
